sections.heading: TNM
sections.content: {"system": "AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, 8th Edition (2017) TNM System", "t_stages": [{"stage": "TX", "description": "Primary tumor cannot be assessed."}, {"stage": "T0", "description": "No evidence of primary tumor."}, {"stage": "Tis", "description": "Carcinoma in situ (Penile intraepithelial neoplasia [PeIN])."}, {"stage": "Ta", "description": "Noninvasive localized squamous cell carcinoma."}, {"stage": "T1", "description": "Tumor invades lamina propria (glans), dermis/lamina propria/dartos fascia (foreskin), or connective tissue between epidermis and corpora (shaft), with or without lymphovascular invasion (LVI) or perineural invasion (PNI), and is or is not high grade."}, {"stage": "T1a", "description": "Tumor is without LVI or PNI and is not high grade (i.e., not grade 3 or sarcomatoid)."}, {"stage": "T1b", "description": "Tumor exhibits LVI and/or PNI or is high grade (i.e., grade 3 or sarcomatoid)."}, {"stage": "T2", "description": "Tumor invades into corpus spongiosum (either glans or ventral shaft) with or without urethral invasion."}, {"stage": "T3", "description": "Tumor invades into corpora cavernosum (including tunica albuginea) with or without urethral invasion."}, {"stage": "T4", "description": "Tumor invades into adjacent structures (i.e., scrotum, prostate, pubic bone)."}], "n_stages": [{"stage": "Clinical (cN)", "substage": "cNX", "description": "Regional lymph nodes cannot be assessed."}, {"stage": "Clinical (cN)", "substage": "cN0", "description": "No palpable or visibly enlarged inguinal lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "Clinical (cN)", "substage": "cN1", "description": "Palpable mobile unilateral inguinal lymph node."}, {"stage": "Clinical (cN)", "substage": "cN2", "description": "Palpable mobile ≥2 unilateral inguinal nodes OR bilateral inguinal lymph nodes."}, {"stage": "Clinical (cN)", "substage": "cN3", "description": "Palpable fixed inguinal nodal mass OR pelvic lymphadenopathy unilateral or bilateral."}, {"stage": "Pathologic (pN)", "substage": "pNX", "description": "Lymph node metastasis cannot be established."}, {"stage": "Pathologic (pN)", "substage": "pN0", "description": "No lymph node metastasis."}, {"stage": "Pathologic (pN)", "substage": "pN1", "description": "≤2 unilateral inguinal metastases, no extranodal extension (ENE)."}, {"stage": "Pathologic (pN)", "substage": "pN2", "description": "≥3 unilateral inguinal metastases OR bilateral metastases."}, {"stage": "Pathologic (pN)", "substage": "pN3", "description": "ENE of lymph node metastases OR pelvic lymph node metastases, no ENE."}], "m_stages": [{"stage": "M0", "description": "No distant metastasis."}, {"stage": "M1", "description": "Distant metastasis present."}], "stage_groups": [{"group": "Stage 0is", "criteria": "Tis, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Carcinoma in situ (PeIN).", "five_yr_survival": "Not specified in staging table.", "treatment_intent": "Curative (organ-sparing approaches possible)."}, {"group": "Stage 0a", "criteria": "Ta, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Noninvasive localized squamous cell carcinoma.", "five_yr_survival": "Not specified in staging table.", "treatment_intent": "Curative (organ-sparing approaches possible)."}, {"group": "Stage I", "criteria": "T1a, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor invades lamina propria/dermis/connective tissue without LVI/PNI and not high grade. No nodal or distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Localized disease: 79% 5-year survival.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IIA", "criteria": "T1b, N0, M0 OR T2, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "T1b: Tumor with LVI/PNI or high grade. T2: Tumor invades corpus spongiosum. No nodal or distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Not specified separately; part of localized group.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IIB", "criteria": "T3, N0, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Tumor invades corpora cavernosum. No nodal or distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Not specified separately; part of localized group.", "treatment_intent": "Curative."}, {"group": "Stage IIIA", "criteria": "T1-3, N1, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Primary tumor T1 to T3 with clinically or pathologically positive unilateral mobile inguinal node(s) ≤2 without ENE. No distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Regional disease: 57% 5-year survival.", "treatment_intent": "Curative (may require multimodal therapy)."}, {"group": "Stage IIIB", "criteria": "T1-3, N2, M0", "clinical_meaning": "Primary tumor T1 to T3 with multiple unilateral or bilateral positive inguinal nodes. No distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Regional disease: 57% 5-year survival.", "treatment_intent": "Curative (multimodal therapy)."}, {"group": "Stage IV", "criteria": "T4, Any N, M0 OR Any T, N3, M0 OR Any T, Any N, M1", "clinical_meaning": "T4: Tumor invades adjacent structures. N3: Fixed inguinal node or pelvic node metastasis. M1: Distant metastasis.", "five_yr_survival": "Distant disease: 10% 5-year survival.", "treatment_intent": "Palliative (with intent to pro"}]}

t_stages.description: Tumor invades lamina propria (glans), dermis/lamina propria/dartos fascia (foreskin), or connective tissue between epidermis and corpora (shaft), with or without lymphovascular invasion (LVI) or perineural invasion (PNI), and is or is not high grade.
Tumor is without LVI or PNI and is not high grade (i.e., not grade 3 or sarcomatoid).
Tumor exhibits LVI and/or PNI or is high grade (i.e., grade 3 or sarcomatoid).
Tumor invades into corpus spongiosum (either glans or ventral shaft) with or without urethral invasion.
Tumor invades into corpora cavernosum (including tunica albuginea) with or without urethral invasion.
Tumor invades into adjacent structures (i.e., scrotum, prostate, pubic bone).

n_stages.description: Regional lymph nodes cannot be assessed.
No palpable or visibly enlarged inguinal lymph nodes.
Palpable mobile unilateral inguinal lymph node.
Palpable mobile ≥2 unilateral inguinal nodes OR bilateral inguinal lymph nodes.
Palpable fixed inguinal nodal mass OR pelvic lymphadenopathy unilateral or bilateral.
Lymph node metastasis cannot be established.
≤2 unilateral inguinal metastases, no extranodal extension (ENE).
≥3 unilateral inguinal metastases OR bilateral metastases.
ENE of lymph node metastases OR pelvic lymph node metastases, no ENE.
